name: Document Understanding V2
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Document Intelligence
services.purpose: Advanced document extraction — custom models for invoices, contracts, forms with layout-aware field extraction and table parsing

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for semantic document understanding — schema mapping, entity resolution, cross-document reasoning, and summary generation

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for real-time document processing

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Extracted document metadata, field mappings, custom schema definitions, processing audit trail, entity relationships

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Document processing pipeline orchestration — intake, extraction, AI enrichment, validation, output routing

prod.note: Always-warm for low-latency document processing, VNET

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Source document repository — PDFs, images, scanned forms, processed outputs, training data for custom models

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Full-text and semantic search over extracted document content — field-level search, faceted navigation, document discovery

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Document Intelligence keys, OpenAI credentials, storage connection strings, customer encryption keys

enterprise.note: HSM-backed keys, CMK for document encryption

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Pipeline performance — extraction accuracy, processing latency, AI enrichment times, error rates per document type

optimization_tips: Use Document Intelligence prebuilt models (invoice, receipt, ID) before training custom models — prebuilt models are cheaper per page and require no training cost
Implement document classification as the first pipeline step — route simple forms to prebuilt models and only use custom models + GPT-4o for complex documents
Cache extraction results by document content hash — re-uploads of identical documents skip re-processing entirely
Use GPT-4o-mini for field validation and simple entity normalization — reserve GPT-4o for cross-document reasoning and complex schema mapping
Move processed documents to Cool storage tier after 7 days — most documents are only actively accessed during processing
Use AI Search Free tier for development — upgrade to Standard only when you need semantic ranking or more than 50MB index size
